topOpportunities.title: Tabata Timer: Interval Timer
topOpportunities.recentChanges:
💪 Internal changes to support Android 15 features.
💪 Google Fit integration has been removed due to Google blocking the app's access to the Google Fit API.
💪 The extension of a shared workout has been changed from .workout to .tabata for compatibility with the iOS version. Both extensions work on Android.
💪 Improved text descriptions of buttons on the timer screen for people with visual impairments.
💪 Minor bug fixes.

topOpportunities.title: Oxford Dictionary & Thesaurus
topOpportunities.recentChanges:
In this update, we're introducing some exciting enhancements:
* A fresh new design for the Word of the Day card
* You can now effortlessly switch between dictionaries and select your preferred one
* The indicator for downloading the database has been enhanced, making it more user-friendly and intuitive
* Bug fixes and stability improvements

Love the app? Rate us!
Have a suggestion? Contact us at support@agent.mobilingo.ai

falsePositives.title: FLIP - Focus Timer for Study
falsePositives.recentChanges:
1. Break Log
Log and manage your breaks while studying — so you can rest smarter, not just harder.

2. Check-in
Check in every day and see just how consistent you've been. Small habits, big results.

3. Mission
Take on study time Missions to keep yourself motivated and on track.

4. Premium Pass Selection
Use Coins earned through Check-in and Missions to unlock the Premium Pass that works best for you.
